claims.claim_text: Incident is named Paribus 2025-01-18 price-manipulation incident.
An estimated loss of about $86K was associated with a price-manipulation attack against Paribus on Arbitrum, with the initial attack path focusing on roughly $60K in ETH, USDT, and ARB
